title: fix: sanitize chat markdown urls
author: its3li
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- sanitize rendered chat markdown href/src attributes before injecting HTML
- block javascript/data payloads in links while preserving normal http(s), mailto, tel, relative, and safe image data src URLs
- add markdown formatter checks for unsafe and normal links

## Verification
- node scripts/test-markdown.js
- npx eslint src/utils/markdown.js scripts/test-markdown.js
- npx biome check apps/chat/src/utils/markdown.js apps/chat/scripts/test-markdown.js
- npm run build

gist.headline: Sanitized for your protection
gist.blurb: The chat interface now scrubs markdown links to prevent sneaky javascript payloads from slipping through. Keep your clicking carefree.
gist.summary: Implemented a URL sanitizer in the chat markdown renderer to block javascript and malicious data payloads in href and src attributes.
gist.impact: Chat links are now strictly filtered to allow only safe protocols like http(s), mailto, and tel, ensuring malicious payloads cannot be executed via clicks.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee wearing a tiny security guard hat, inspecting a glowing link with a magnifying glass. The Nomnom creature eating a 'bad' red link while a 'good' green link passes through.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny security guard hat, inspecting a glowing blue link with a magnifying glass. The round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a red glowing 'javascript:' payload nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
